title: Judgment/status pass; L-01..L-04 non-blocking limitations
public_claim: Judgment/status pass; L-01..L-04 non-blocking limitations is a preserved project packet for this is the thinnest and most legalistic of the 11 zips: a quality-gate judgment pass over the 2026-03-30 replacement archive that converts a Pass-01 NOT-DONE verdict into a Pass-02 DONE verdict.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
